testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,1], indexDiff = 3, valueDiff = 0 Output: true Explanation: We can choose (i, j) = (0, 3). We satisfy the three conditions: i != j --> 0 != 3 abs(i - j) <= indexDiff --> abs(0 - 3) <= 3 abs(nums[i] - nums[j]) <= valueDiff --> abs(1 - 1) <= 0
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: We can choose (i, j) = (0, 3). We satisfy the three conditions: i != j --> 0 != 3 abs(i - j) <= indexDiff --> abs(0 - 3) <= 3 abs(nums[i] - nums[j]) <= valueDiff --> abs(1 - 1) <= 0

testcases.input: nums = [1,5,9,1,5,9], indexDiff = 2, valueDiff = 3 Output: false Explanation: After trying all the possible pairs (i, j), we cannot satisfy the three conditions, so we return false.
